---
title: "Inspect Extensions"
page-layout: full
anchor-sections: false
toc: false
css: extensions.css
resources:
  - extensions.json
  - extensions-app.js
include-after-body:
  - text: |
      <script type="module" src="./extensions-app.js"></script>
aliases:
  - /integrations/index.html
execute:
  enabled: true
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
exec(open("generate.py").read())
```

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<div id="extensions-app" data-src="./extensions.json"></div>
:::
